nodes.name: deploy-pages.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that publishes the static web/ demo dashboard for the Marketing OS project to GitHub Pages on pushes to main or the web-app-interface branch, or via manual dispatch.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-job workflow using path filters (web/**) and a concurrency group to ensure only one Pages deploy runs at a time.

nodes.name: deploy
nodes.summary: Job that checks out the repo, configures GitHub Pages, uploads the web/ directory as a Pages artifact, and deploys it via actions/deploy-pages.
